[basic link](https://example.com)
[titled link](https://example.com "Example")
[**bold link**](https://example.com)
[angle bracket](<https://example.com/path>)
[parens in url](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fish_(computing))
[single quote title](https://example.com 'A Title')
[not a link] no parens after bracket
[javascript blocked](javascript:alert(1))
